title: Picture-perfect garden at Rabbit Hole
description: HOFMEYR NEWS - The Hofmeyr Garden Club...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"HOFMEYR NEWS - The Hofmeyr Garden Club visited the Rabbit Hole restaurant near Schoombee on 26 February.","html":"HOFMEYR NEWS - The Hofmeyr Garden Club visited the Rabbit Hole restaurant near Schoombee on 26 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Manager and chef Adrienne Southey's artistically designed gardens changed the way gardens are usually viewed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Being an artist as well, Adrienne incorporated many areas where beautiful artistic photos can be taken.","html":"Being an artist as well, Adrienne incorporated many areas where beautiful artistic photos can be taken."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The visit to Adrienne's garden at the Rabbit Hole, completely changed the perspective of a formal garden setting, into a picture-perfect garden where you cannot stop taking photographs, because each view is a new art work,\" exclaimed Rosemary Jordaan.","html":"\"The visit to Adrienne's garden at the Rabbit Hole, completely changed the perspective of a formal garden setting, into a picture-perfect garden where you cannot stop taking photographs, because each view is a new art work,\" exclaimed Rosemary Jordaan."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Jordaan established beautiful gardens at De Keur, their own farm in the same area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A picture in a picture in the garden at the Rabbit Hole.","html":"A picture in a picture in the garden at the Rabbit Hole."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
